title: helictotrichon praeustum subsp. pseudoviolaceum
intro: Helictotrichon praeustum subsp. pseudoviolaceum is a lesser-known subspecies of the Helictotrichon praeustum plant, belonging to the grass family (Poaceae). It is also known as a type of grass or wild grass, but further research was not found. Unfortunately, there is limited information available about its medicinal properties and health benefits, and no specific herbal preparations are known.
